  "findings": [
    "Crushed flexible ductwork restricting airflow",
    "Excessively long flexible duct run exceeding maximum allowable length and causing sag"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove and replace the damaged or crushed flexible duct sections",
    "Shorten the flexible duct runs to the minimum necessary length to avoid sagging and excess static pressure",
    "Ensure proper support spacing per SMACNA standards to prevent future sagging or pinching"
  ],
  "rationale": "Flexible ducts must be installed fully extended and supported to prevent sagging, kinks, or crushing, which severely restricts airflow and increases static pressure. IMC 603 and SMACNA guidelines limit the length of flexible duct runs and require proper support to maintain the cross-sectional area.",
  "references": [
    "IMC Section 603",
    "SMACNA HVAC Duct Construction Standards",
    "ACCA Manual D"
  ]
}
